# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authz-policy
spec:
    targetRef:
        group: policy.linkerd.io
        kind: HTTPRoute
        name: default-route
    default: DENY
    requiredAuthenticationRefs:
        - name: default-server-authentication
          kind: ServerAuthentication
          group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-route
spec:
    parentRefs:
        - group: gateway.networking.k8s.io
          kind: Gateway
          name: linkerd-global-gateway
          namespace: linkerd
    rules:
        - matches:
            - path:
                type: PathPrefix
                value: /
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-server-authentication
spec:
    unauthenticated: true
    client:
        meshTLS:
            identities:
                - "*"
